LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT YUNG TIM CHEUK'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S PROPOSED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS COMPULSORY. GIVEN THE LIBERAL POLICY TO PERMIT THE FILING OF CROSS-COMPLAINT, THE MOTION IS GRANTED. (CCP 426.50.) THE TRIAL DATE OF MARCH 10, 2014 IS VACATED, AND THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR SEPTEMBER 8, 2014. THE DISCOVERY CUTOFF SHALL BE DETERMINED IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Continued To Sep-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Def Yung Tim Cheuk'S Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File X-Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT Yung Tim Cheuk'S motion For Leave To File cross-Complaint IS Granted. Defendant's proposed Cross-Complaint is compulsory. Given the liberal policy to permit the filing of cross-complaint, the motion is granted. (CCP 426.50.) The trial date of March 10, 2014 is vacated, and the new trial date is set for September 8, 2014. The discovery cutoff shall be determined in accordance with the new trial date. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
